---
title: "Launching Knowledge Discovery From Onbase App Builder"
---

---
title: "Launching Knowledge Discovery from OnBase App Builder"
source: "https://support.hyland.com/r/Current/OnBase-Connector-for-Content-Intelligence/pqi1743427012390"
section: "OnBase Connector for Content Intelligence"
---

You can access Knowledge Discovery directly from the OnBase App Builder.

To launch Knowledge Discovery from the OnBase App Builder:

1.  Login to the OnBase App Builder.
2.  On the upper right corner, click the Ask Discovery icon.   ![](data:image/png;base64,)   You are directed to the Knowledge Discovery page.Note: The Ask Discovery button should redirect you to the Knowledge Discovery page. If your version of OnBase of OnBase is set up for initial patches of version 25.1 this button will not work.
